nt-green-500.usage: Approval, progress and success indicators. Never primary CTAs.

components.name: AnnouncementBar
components.description: Dismissible top-of-page ribbon for platform-wide announcements.

props.name: href
props.description: Optional URL for the CTA link.

props.name: ctaLabel
props.description: Optional link label rendered after the message.

props.name: dismissible
props.description: Whether the bar can be dismissed by the user.

components.responsiveNotes: Keep to a single line on desktop; allow text wrap up to two lines on mobile. Dismiss button must remain 44x44px touch target.
components.accessibilityNotes: Role of banner or complementary with aria-label 'Announcement'. Dismiss button has aria-label 'Close announcement'. Focus is not trapped.
components.animationNotes: Framer Motion 'initial={{ y: -32, opacity: 0 }}' 'animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }}' duration 0.3s. Exit uses AnimatePresence 'y: -32, opacity: 0'. On prefers-reduced-motion, omit the y translation and cross-fade instantly.

components.name: Header
components.description: Sticky global header with logo, navigation, locale selector and primary CTA.

state.name: isScrolled
state.description: True when page scroll exceeds threshold.

components.responsiveNotes: Desktop: horizontal inline layout. Tablet/mobile: links collapse into hamburger sheet, locale selector moves into sheet footer. Height: 72px desktop, 64px mobile. Stays fixed with z-50.
components.accessibilityNotes: Wrap in <header> with aria-label 'Main navigation'. Logo link is first focusable element. Mobile toggle is a native button with aria-expanded and aria-controls. Skip-to-content link precedes the header.
components.animationNotes: Use Framer Motion layoutScroll for scroll-driven background switch. isScrolled animates backgroundColor via motion.header with transition 0.2s. Burger icon uses animate path d-values for open/close. No parallax.

components.name: LocaleSelector
components.description: Language switcher supporting all eight NavDhan locales.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback when a locale is selected.

props.name: variant
props.description: Compact renders current locale label only; full renders native label list.

components.responsiveNotes: Compact variant always visible in header. Full variant renders inside mobile menu sheet. On mobile full variant, options stack vertically with 44px touch targets.
components.accessibilityNotes: Use a labelled combobox (Select / Listbox) or set of native radio buttons. aria-label 'Select language'. aria-expanded on dropdown trigger. Full dropdown traps focus with Escape to close.
components.animationNotes: Framer Motion dropdown list uses initial='hidden' animate='visible' variants with opacity and y: -4. Stagger children 30ms. Reduced motion: render list instantly without height animation.

components.name: Footer
components.description: Global footer with company, contact, legal links and trust badges.
components.responsiveNotes: Desktop: 4-column grid (brand, contact, company, legal). Tablet: 2-column. Mobile: single column with collapsible link accordions. Badges sit at bottom and center-wrap on small screens.
components.accessibilityNotes: <footer> landmark. Link groups use <nav> with aria-labelledby pointing to the group heading. All links have visible focus rings. Color contrast of muted text on dark surface >= 4.5:1.
components.animationNotes: Static by default. Optional Framer Motion viewport reveal: container 'whileInView' opacity 0->1, y 16->0 with duration 0.6s once. Reduced motion: render statically.

components.name: Section
components.description: Reusable vertical section wrapper with consistent spacing and background options.
components.responsiveNotes: Padding maps to clamp(5rem, 8vw, 7rem) by default and 2rem tight on all breakpoints. Inner content respects Container max width.
components.accessibilityNotes: Use semantic section when appropriate. If the section starts a named region, provide aria-labelledby pointing to its heading.
components.animationNotes: No intrinsic animation. May accept 'motionProps' to allow Framer Motion whileInView wrappers for parent-level stagger.

components.name: Container
components.description: Centered max-width content wrapper for page-level gutters.

props.name: size
props.description: Max width preset: default 1280px, legal 1024px, full 100vw.

components.responsiveNotes: Horizontal padding: 1rem (mobile), 1.5rem (tablet), 2rem (desktop). Legal pages use narrower max-width for readability.
components.accessibilityNotes: No interactive semantics; ensures content remains within 320% zoom reflow. Avoid nesting multiple Containers.

components.name: Hero
components.description: Homepage hero with primary tagline, CTAs and trust stats.
components.responsiveNotes: Desktop: large H1 with inline stats row. Mobile: H1 scales via clamp, CTAs stack full-width, stats collapse to 2x2 grid or vertical list below copy. Max reading measure 65ch.
components.accessibilityNotes: Single H1 for the page. Keep DOM order: eyebrow, heading, body, CTAs, stats. Decorative accents have aria-hidden. Primary CTA arrow icon is hidden from AT.
components.animationNotes: Framer Motion staggered entrance: parent motion.div 'staggerChildren: 0.08', each child initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 16 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} with duration 0.7s and ease [0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94] as cubic-bezier. Stats animate last. Respect prefers-reduced-motion by forcing first-paint visibility.

components.name: AssociationBadges

props.name: badges
props.type: { name: string; logoAsset: string; href?: string; altKey: string }[]
props.description: Badge items rendered in a row.

components.responsiveNotes: Desktop: 4 logos in a single evenly spaced row. Tablet: 2x2 grid. Mobile: horizontal scroll-snap row to preserve legibility without shrinking logos.
components.accessibilityNotes: Section labelled by 'Recognised by' heading. Badge links (when href present) have visible focus and descriptive aria-label. Preserve SVG alt text via altKey.
components.animationNotes: Framer Motion viewport fade-in: container 'whileInView' opacity 0->1, duration 0.6s, once. Individual badges can scale to 1.02 on hover with whileHover={{ scale: 1.02 }} transition 0.2s.

components.name: EcosystemTicker
components.description: Infinite horizontal marquee of tech ecosystem partner logos.

props.name: partners
props.type: { name: string; logoAsset: string; href?: string; altKey: string }[]

props.name: speedSeconds
props.description: Duration of one full marquee loop in seconds.

components.responsiveNotes: Desktop and mobile both render as a single continuous row. Duplicate the partner array to ensure seamless loop. Min logo width 96px on mobile, 128px on desktop.
components.accessibilityNotes: Wrap in a section with aria-roledescription 'marquee'. Provide a pause button or pause on hover/focus. If logos are links, focus should pause the animation automatically. Respect prefers-reduced-motion by converting to a static scroll-snap list.
components.animationNotes: Framer Motion infinite marquee using animate={{ x: '-50%' }} transition={{ repeat: Infinity, duration: 30, ease: 'linear' }} on a duplicated flex track. Pause controlled by animationControls.stop() / play() on hover. Reduced motion: remove animation, render horizontal scroll-snap.

components.name: LoanProducts
components.description: Grid of loan product cards with icon, title, description and CTA.
components.responsiveNotes: Desktop: 4-column equal-width grid. Tablet: 2-column. Mobile: single-column cards. Section CTA is centered below the grid.
components.accessibilityNotes: Section heading is H2. Cards are generic article or div with role none; clickable CTA inside each card is a real link/button with focus ring. Avoid making the entire card clickable to preserve screen-reader context.
components.animationNotes: Framer Motion staggered cards: viewport trigger, parent 'staggerChildren: 0.1', children initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 24 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} duration 0.6s. Hover: border color transition and subtle shadow via whileHover={{ y: -2 }}.

components.name: WhyNavDhan
components.description: Value proposition grid with reasons and trust badges.
components.responsiveNotes: Desktop: 3-column grid of reasons. Tablet: 2-column. Mobile: single column. Trust badges sit between the grid and the CTA, wrapping on narrow screens.
components.accessibilityNotes: H2 section heading followed by intro paragraph. Each reason has an H3 title. Trust badges are rendered as an unordered list with list-style none and aria-label 'Trust indicators'.
components.animationNotes: Framer Motion staggered grid reveal: parent viewport trigger, 'staggerChildren: 0.08', children origin centered with opacity and y 24->0, duration 0.6s. Trust badges fade in as a block after the grid.

components.name: RecognitionCarousel
components.description: Carousel of recognition / award items with auto-advance.

props.name: showControls
props.description: Show previous / next controls and dots.

components.responsiveNotes: Desktop: horizontal snap slider with one visible card. Tablet: two visible cards. Mobile: single card with dot pagination and edge padding.
components.accessibilityNotes: Role region with aria-roledescription 'carousel'. Live region announces slide changes politely. Controls use aria-labels 'Previous recognition', 'Next recognition'. Pagination dots use aria-selected. Focus management: focus stays on control after click.
components.animationNotes: Framer Motion slider track animate={{ x: -activeIndex * slideWidth }} transition={{ duration: 0.4, ease: [0.4, 0, 0.2, 1] }}. Auto-advance via useEffect interval wrapped by pause state. Reduced motion: disable x translation and auto-advance; show static grid.

components.name: CustomerStories
components.description: Customer story cards with quote, outcome and CTA.

state.name: activeIndex
state.description: Pagination index for mobile swipe view.

components.responsiveNotes: Desktop: 3-column equal-height cards. Tablet: 2-column. Mobile: horizontal swipe carousel with pagination dots. Maintain image aspect ratio 4:3.
components.accessibilityNotes: H2 for section, H3 for each story card title. Customer images have meaningful alt including name. CTA links have visible focus. Swipe region has aria-roledescription 'carousel' and live region for mobile pagination.
components.animationNotes: Framer Motion viewport stagger: parent 'staggerChildren: 0.12', children initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 24 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} duration 0.6s. On mobile, use AnimatePresence for cross-fade between activeIndex with opacity transition 0.3s.

components.name: EmiCalculator
components.description: Interactive EMI calculator with loan amount, rate and tenure sliders.
components.responsiveNotes: Desktop: calculator card on left, breakdown on right in a 2-column layout. Tablet/mobile: stacked single column; breakdown becomes a summary row below the sliders. Touch-friendly slider thumbs are 24px.
components.accessibilityNotes: All sliders are native <input type='range'> with associated <label> and aria-valuetext that exposes formatted amount/rate/tenure. Number results are updated live in an aria-live region 'polite'. Errors announced via aria-live 'assertive'.
components.animationNotes: Framer Motion count-up on result numbers: use motion.span with animate={{ value }} only when locale/currency formatting allows; otherwise cross-fade opacity 0.2s. Slider thumb scales on drag via whileDrag={{ scale: 1.15 }}. Reduced motion: values update instantly.

components.name: FinalCta
components.description: Closing call-to-action section that precedes the footer.
components.responsiveNotes: Desktop: centered block max-width 56ch with inline buttons. Mobile: buttons stack full-width, heading size down to H2 via clamp.
components.accessibilityNotes: H2 section heading. Buttons are real <a> or <button> elements. Ensure sufficient contrast for the background variant used.
components.animationNotes: Framer Motion 'whileInView' fadeScale: initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.98 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }} transition={{ duration: 0.6, ease: [0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94] }}. Buttons can lift 2px on hover.

components.name: TeamPage
components.description: Static team page composed of page hero, members grid, advisors and join CTA.
components.responsiveNotes: Page uses global marketing layout, so Header/Footer are reused. Members grid is 3-4 columns desktop, 2 tablet, 1 mobile. Advisors use a denser 2-column layout. All card images maintain 1:1 ratio.
components.accessibilityNotes: Single H1 for the page. Member and advisor cards use <article> with H2/H3 names. LinkedIn links open in new tab with rel='noopener noreferrer' and aria-label including target context.
components.animationNotes: Framer Motion per-section viewport reveals: header text staggers in, member grid uses staggerChildren 0.08 with y 24->0 and opacity, advisors follow. Reduced motion: all sections static.

legalShell.note: Legal pages reuse the global Header (transparent variant) and Footer. No separate legal shell components are registered.

animationPrinciples: Avoid scroll-triggered fades on every paragraph.
Use translateY + opacity for reveals; use scale for feedback.
Reduced motion fallback: set durations to 0ms, disable auto-advancing carousels and marquees, and render static layouts.
i18nPrinciples: Store locale only in the URL path; avoid third-party cookies.
Hindi (hi) copy must be reviewed by a native speaker before release.
All Indic scripts are left-to-right; do not mirror layout.
